decision.reasoning: Broad market risk-off event (VIX +18%) with systematic selling across equities. No position breached 5% stop-loss threshold (max: IWM -3.78%). Portfolio drawdown (-2.65%) contained by 40% cash buffer. GLD rally (+1.58%) confirms safe-haven flows. RSI levels not at extremes except FEZ (29.7). Reactive selling at market open would violate systematic approach. Awaiting daily close decision at 21:30 UTC with full session data.
decision.risk_assessment: Managed - within expected volatility for risk-off regime
